name: Hotel Grand Central Limited
summary: Hotel Grand Central Limited, together with its subsidiaries, owns, operates, and manages hotels in Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, New Zealand, and China. It also provides marketing and support, and management services; and invests in commercial properties. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Singapore. Hotel Grand Central Limited is a subsidiary of Tan Chee Hoe & Sons Holdings Pte. Ltd.
